title: Directive
description: Governance DNA archetype for Directive — identity-level normative constraints (DNA 'D'). Standalone first-class GSM class typed by DirectiveArchetype. Fields: structureId, purposeStructureId, modal, verb, qualifier.

structureId.description: The owning/authoring Structure's elementId. This is the Structure that issues the Directive (definedBy relationship).

purposeStructureId.description: The governed purpose Structure's elementId. Purpose is attribute of another Structure de-facto governed by this Structure's Directive. Represents the scope of applicability (directsPurposeOf relationship). Optional — if absent, the Directive applies to the owning Structure's own purpose.

modal.description: Deontic obligation strength. MUST = mandatory (violation = non-compliance). SHOULD = recommended (violation = warning). MAY = optional (informational).

verb.description: Governance action expressing what the governance intent does to the quality dimension.

qualifier.description: The viability dimension targeted by this Directive — a non-empty string naming the quality attribute (e.g., 'integrity', 'throughput', 'latency').
